---
title: "DPPOS-df"
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-01"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)


library(foreign)
library(nhanesA)
library(tidyverse)
library(gridExtra)
library(broom)
require(rms)
library(ggplot2)
library(naniar)
library(mosaic)
require(dplyr)
require(brms)
library(pROC)
library(AUC)
library(viridis)

library(caret)
library(xgboost)
```


```{r}
2+2
```



```{r setup Phase 1, include=FALSE}
path <- "~/Documents/Data/"
demo.1   <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase1/Non_Form_Based/demographic.csv")) %>% mutate(Phase="1")
events.1 <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase1/Non_Form_Based/events.csv"))  %>% mutate(Phase="1")
lab.1    <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase1/Non_Form_Based/laboratory.csv"))  %>% mutate(Phase="1")

f02.1  <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase1/Form_Based/F02.csv"))  %>% mutate(Phase="1")
f06.1  <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase1/Form_Based/F06.csv"))  %>% mutate(Phase="1")
q16.1  <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase1/Form_Based/Q16.csv"))  %>% mutate(Phase="1")

standardize_id <- function(df) {
  if ("RELEASE_ID" %in% names(df)) return(df)
  if ("release_id" %in% names(df)) {
  return(dplyr::rename(df, RELEASE_ID = release_id))
  }
  
  
  stop("No RELEASE_ID or release_id column found in this data frame.")
}

demo.1   <- standardize_id(demo.1)
events.1 <- standardize_id(events.1)
lab.1    <- standardize_id(lab.1)
f02.1    <- standardize_id(f02.1)
f06.1    <- standardize_id(f06.1)
q16.1    <- standardize_id(q16.1)
```


```{r setup Phase 2, include=FALSE}
demo.2   <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase2/Non_Form_Based/demographic.csv")) %>% mutate(Phase="2")
events.2 <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase2/Non_Form_Based/events.csv")) %>% mutate(Phase="2")
lab.2    <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase2/Non_Form_Based/lab.csv")) %>% mutate(Phase="2")

f02.2  <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase2/Form_Based/F02.csv")) %>% mutate(Phase="2")
f06.2  <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase2/Form_Based/F06.csv")) %>% mutate(Phase="2")
q16.2  <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase2/Form_Based/Q16.csv")) %>% mutate(Phase="2")



demo.2   <- standardize_id(demo.2)
events.2 <- standardize_id(events.2)
lab.2    <- standardize_id(lab.2)
f02.2    <- standardize_id(f02.2)
f06.2    <- standardize_id(f06.2)
q16.2    <- standardize_id(q16.2)
```

```{r setup Phase 3, include=FALSE}
demo.3   <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase3/Non_Form_Based/demographic.csv")) %>% mutate(Phase="3")
demo.3 <- demo.3 %>% rename(BMI=bmi,AGE=age,SEX=sex) %>% 
  mutate(
    # Collapse BMI into 10 categories (2 kg/m^2 intervals)
    # Definition: <26, >=26-<28, ..., >=42
    BMI_CAT = case_when(
      BMI < 26 ~ 1,
      BMI >= 26 & BMI < 28 ~ 2,
      BMI >= 28 & BMI < 30 ~ 3,
      BMI >= 30 & BMI < 32 ~ 4,
      BMI >= 32 & BMI < 34 ~ 5,
      BMI >= 34 & BMI < 36 ~ 6,
      BMI >= 36 & BMI < 38 ~ 7,
      BMI >= 38 & BMI < 40 ~ 8,
      BMI >= 40 & BMI < 42 ~ 9,
      BMI >= 42 ~ 10,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_ # Handle missing data
    ),

    # Collapse AGE into 7 categories (5-year intervals)
    # Definition: <40, 40-44, ..., 65+
    AGEGROUP = case_when(
      AGE < 40 ~ 1,
      AGE >= 40 & AGE < 45 ~ 2,
      AGE >= 45 & AGE < 50 ~ 3,
      AGE >= 50 & AGE < 55 ~ 4,
      AGE >= 55 & AGE < 60 ~ 5,
      AGE >= 60 & AGE < 65 ~ 6,
      AGE >= 65 ~ 7,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_ # Handle missing data
    ),
    # Collapse BMI into 3 categories (Tertiles)
    # Definition: <30, >=30 to <35, >=35
    BMIGROUP = case_when(
      BMI < 30 ~ 1,
      BMI >= 30 & BMI < 35 ~ 2,
      BMI >= 35 ~ 3,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_ # Handle missing data
    )
  )

newdm.3 <- read.csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase3/Non_Form_Based/DIABETES.CSV")) %>% mutate(Phase="3")
cvd.mort.3 <- read.csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase3/Non_Form_Based/CVD_MORT_CANC.CSV")) %>% mutate(Phase="3")
#events.3 <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase3/Non_Form_Based/events.csv"))
lab.3    <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase3/Non_Form_Based/LAB.csv")) %>% mutate(Phase="3")

f02.3  <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase3/Form_Based/F02.csv")) %>% mutate(Phase="3")
f06.3  <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase3/Form_Based/F06.csv")) %>% mutate(Phase="3")
q26.3  <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase3/Form_Based/Q26.csv")) %>% mutate(Phase="3")



demo.3   <- standardize_id(demo.3)
#events.3 <- standardize_id(events.3)
newdm.3 <- standardize_id(newdm.3)
cvd.mort.3 <- standardize_id(cvd.mort.3)
lab.3    <- standardize_id(lab.3)
f02.3    <- standardize_id(f02.3)
f06.3    <- standardize_id(f06.3)
q26.3    <- standardize_id(q26.3)
```

```{r setup Bridge, include=FALSE}
demo.b   <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPP_Bridge/Non_Form_Based/demographic.csv"))%>% mutate(Phase="Bridge")
events.b <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPP_Bridge/Non_Form_Based/events.csv"))  %>% mutate(Phase="Bridge")
lab.b    <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPP_Bridge/Non_Form_Based/LAB.csv"))  %>% mutate(Phase="Bridge")

f02.b  <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPP_Bridge/Form_Based/F02.csv"))  %>% mutate(Phase="Bridge")
#f06.b  <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPP_Bridge/Form_Based/F06.csv")
#q16.b  <- read_csv(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPP_Bridge/Form_Based/Q16.csv")



demo.b   <- standardize_id(demo.b)
events.b <- standardize_id(events.b)
lab.b    <- standardize_id(lab.b)
f02.b    <- standardize_id(f02.b)
#f06.b    <- standardize_id(f06.b)
#q16.b    <- standardize_id(q16.b)
```


```{r}
q16.1
```


```{r}
demo <- rbind(demo.1 %>% mutate(AGE=NA,BMI=NA),
              demo.2 %>% mutate(AGE=NA,BMI=NA),
              demo.3 %>% select(-c(R16)),
              demo.b %>% mutate(AGE=NA,BMI=NA)) %>% arrange(RELEASE_ID, Phase) %>% relocate(RELEASE_ID,Phase,ASSIGN) # %>% filter(ASSIGN=="Lifestyle" | ASSIGN=="Placebo") 

lab <- rbind(lab.1 %>% select(RELEASE_ID,VISIT,G000,G120,HBA1,CREA,Phase,DAYSRAND,CHOL,CHDL,CLDL),
      lab.2 %>% select(RELEASE_ID,VISIT,G000,G120,HBA1,CREA,Phase,DAYSRAND,CHOL,CHDL,CLDL),
      lab.3 %>% select(RELEASE_ID,VISIT,G000,G120,HBA1,CREA,Phase,DAYSRAND,CHOL,CHDL,CLDL),      
      lab.b %>% select(RELEASE_ID,VISIT,G000,G120,HBA1,CREA,Phase,DAYSRAND,CHOL,CHDL,CLDL)
      )

events <- rbind(
  rbind(events.1,events.2) %>% select(-RANDPER),
  newdm.3 %>% select(-c(D6DATA,CLINIC)),
  events.b %>% select(RELEASE_ID,TOTALTIM,DIABF,DIABT,DIABV,Phase)) %>% arrange(RELEASE_ID, Phase) %>% relocate(RELEASE_ID,Phase)


# names(rbind(lab.1,lab.2 %>% select(-UCRE))  %>% select(-c( LDLB   ,    LDLC   ,    LDLZ  ,     FIBR    ,   CRP )))
# names(lab.3)
# lab.temp <- rbind(
#   rbind(lab.1,lab.2 %>% select(-UCRE))  %>% select(-c( LDLB   ,    LDLC   ,    LDLZ  ,     FIBR    ,   CRP )),
#   lab.3 %>% select(-VB12)) %>% select(-c(DRNK0M,DRNK30M,DRNK2H))
# 
# lab.b2 <- lab.b[,names(lab.temp)]
# lab <- rbind(lab.temp,lab.b2)




# f06.names <- intersect(intersect(names(f06.1),names(f06.2)),names(f06.3))
# f06 <- rbind(f06.1[,f06.names],
#       f06.2[,f06.names],
#       f06.3[,f06.names])

#q16.names <- intersect(intersect(names(q16.1),names(q16.2)),names(q26.3))


q26.3
```


```{r F02 codification}
library(dplyr)
library(readr)

# Helper function to safely calculate means across columns, handling missing values
# Returns NA if all columns are NA for that row
safe_mean <- function(..., na.rm = TRUE) {
  rowMeans(cbind(...), na.rm = na.rm)
}

process_f02 <- function(file_path, phase_name) {
  
  # Read dataset (suppressing column type messages for cleanliness)
  data <- read_csv(file_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  # Standardize column names to uppercase to handle inconsistencies
  colnames(data) <- toupper(colnames(data))
  
  # Check for existence of specific physical measure columns before processing
  # Note: "AP" prefix typically stands for "Annual Physical"
  
  # --- WEIGHT ---
  # Usually APWGHT1 and APWGHT2. Sometimes a 3rd measure exists.
  if("APWGHT1" %in% names(data)) {
    cols_weight <- select(data, starts_with("APWGHT"))
    data$WEIGHT_KG <- rowMeans(cols_weight, na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    data$WEIGHT_KG <- NA_real_
  }
  
  # --- WAIST CIRCUMFERENCE ---
  # Usually APWAIST1 and APWAIST2.
  if("APWSTC1" %in% names(data)) {
    cols_waist <- select(data, starts_with("APWSTC"))
    data$WAIST_CM <- rowMeans(cols_waist, na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    data$WAIST_CM <- NA_real_
  }
  
  # --- BLOOD PRESSURE (SYSTOLIC) ---
  # Usually APSYS1, APSYS2, etc.
  if("APSBP1" %in% names(data)) {
    cols_sys <- select(data, starts_with("APSBP"))
    data$BP_SYSTOLIC <- rowMeans(cols_sys, na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    data$BP_SYSTOLIC <- NA_real_
  }
  
  # --- BLOOD PRESSURE (DIASTOLIC) ---
  # Usually APDIA1, APDIA2, etc.
  if("APDBP1" %in% names(data)) {
    cols_dia <- select(data, starts_with("APDBP"))
    data$BP_DIASTOLIC <- rowMeans(cols_dia, na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    data$BP_DIASTOLIC <- NA_real_
  }
  
  # --- BLOOD PRESSURE (DIASTOLIC) ---
  # Usually APDIA1, APDIA2, etc.
  if("APHGHT1" %in% names(data)) {
    cols_hgt <- select(data, starts_with("APHGHT"))
    data$HEIGHT <- rowMeans(cols_hgt, na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    data$HEIGHT <- NA_real_
  }  

  
  # --- CREATE FINAL HARMONIZED DATASET ---
  clean_data <- data %>%
    mutate(
      Phase = phase_name,
      # Ensure key identifiers exist
      RELEASE_ID = as.character(RELEASE_ID),
      VISIT = as.character(VISIT),
      # Create a visit order proxy using DAYSRAND
      DAYSRAND = if("DAYSRAND" %in% names(data)) DAYSRAND else NA_real_
    ) %>%
    select(
      RELEASE_ID, 
      DAYSRAND,
      Phase,
      VISIT, 
      WEIGHT_KG, 
      WAIST_CM, 
      BP_SYSTOLIC, 
      BP_DIASTOLIC, 
      HEIGHT
    )
  
  return(clean_data)
}

#--- EXECUTION ---
#You would provide the specific file paths to your downloaded CSVs here
bridge_df <- process_f02(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPP_Bridge/Form_Based/f02.csv"), "Bridge")
phase1_df <- process_f02(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase1/Form_Based/f02.csv"), "1")
phase2_df <- process_f02(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase2/Form_Based/f02.csv"), "2")
phase3_df <- process_f02(paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/Data/DPPOS_Phase3/Form_Based/F02.csv"), "3")

#Combine all
all_f02_data <- bind_rows(bridge_df, phase1_df, phase2_df, phase3_df) %>%
  arrange(RELEASE_ID, DAYSRAND)

all_f02_data

```

```{r}
```


```{r}
demo_unique   <- demo  # %>% dplyr::distinct(RELEASE_ID, .keep_all = TRUE)
events_unique <- events #%>% dplyr::distinct(RELEASE_ID, .keep_all = TRUE)
lab_unique    <- lab   # %>% dplyr::distinct(RELEASE_ID, .keep_all = TRUE)

#if (exists("f02")) {
#  f02_unique <- f02 %>% dplyr::distinct(RELEASE_ID, .keep_all = TRUE)
#}
# 
# if (exists("f06")) {
#   f06_unique <- f06 %>% dplyr::distinct(RELEASE_ID, .keep_all = TRUE)
# }
# 
# if (exists("q16")) {
#   q16_unique <- q16 %>% dplyr::distinct(RELEASE_ID, .keep_all = TRUE)
# }

vitals_f02 <- all_f02_data %>%
  transmute(
    RELEASE_ID,Phase,VISIT,DAYSRAND,
    height_cm = HEIGHT,#rowMeans(select(., starts_with("APHGHT")), na.rm = TRUE),
    weight_kg = WEIGHT_KG,#rowMeans(select(., starts_with("APWGHT")), na.rm = TRUE),
    waist_cm      = WAIST_CM,
    BPXSY       = BP_SYSTOLIC,#rowMeans(select(., starts_with("APSBP")),  na.rm = TRUE),
    BPXDI       = BP_DIASTOLIC#rowMeans(select(., starts_with("APDBP")),  na.rm = TRUE)
  )



# vitals_f06 <- f06_unique %>%


labs_bl <- lab_unique %>% 
  transmute(
    RELEASE_ID,Phase,VISIT,DAYSRAND,
    LBXGLU = G000,  # fasting glucose
    LBXGLT = G120,  # 2-hr OGTT
    LBXGH  = HBA1,  # A1c
    LBXSCR = CREA,   # creatinine
    LBDHDD = CHDL, # HDL
    LBXTC = CHOL, # Chol
    LBDLDL = CLDL # LDL
  )


dppos_outcome <- events_unique %>%
  transmute(
    RELEASE_ID,Phase,
    diabetes_flag    = if ("DIABF" %in% names(.)) DIABF else NA_real_,
    time_to_diabetes = if ("DIABT" %in% names(.)) DIABT else NA_real_
  )

age_midpoints <- c(38, 42, 47, 52, 57, 62, 67)

demo_baseline <- demo_unique %>%
  mutate(
    RIDAGEYR = if ("AGEGROUP" %in% names(.))
                 age_midpoints[AGEGROUP]
               else NA_real_,
    RIAGENDR = if ("SEX" %in% names(.))
                 as.numeric(SEX)
               else NA_real_,
    RIDRETH1 = if ("RACE_ETH" %in% names(.))
                 as.numeric(RACE_ETH)
               else NA_real_
  ) %>%
  select(RELEASE_ID, Phase, ASSIGN, AGE, RIDAGEYR, RIAGENDR, RIDRETH1)
```


```{r}
dppos_derived<- labs_bl %>% 
  left_join(vitals_f02 %>% mutate(RELEASE_ID=as.numeric(RELEASE_ID)) ,by=join_by(RELEASE_ID,VISIT,Phase)) %>% relocate(RELEASE_ID,VISIT) %>% arrange(RELEASE_ID,VISIT) %>%
  left_join(demo_baseline,by=join_by(RELEASE_ID,Phase)) %>% 
  left_join(dppos_outcome,by=join_by(RELEASE_ID,Phase))  %>% mutate(DAYSRAND=coalesce(DAYSRAND.x,DAYSRAND.y)) %>% select(-c(DAYSRAND.x,DAYSRAND.y))%>%
  relocate(RELEASE_ID,DAYSRAND,AGE,RIDAGEYR)

## FIXING AGE 
dppos_derived <- dppos_derived %>% 
  left_join(dppos_derived  %>% group_by(RELEASE_ID) %>% summarise(AGE.REAL= mean(AGE,na.rm=TRUE)) ,by=join_by(RELEASE_ID)) %>% select(-c(height_cm)) %>% 
  left_join(dppos_derived  %>% group_by(RELEASE_ID) %>% summarise(height_cm= mean(height_cm,na.rm=TRUE)) ,by=join_by(RELEASE_ID)) %>%
  relocate(RELEASE_ID,DAYSRAND,AGE.REAL,AGE,RIDAGEYR) %>% mutate(RIDAGEYR =round(AGE.REAL + DAYSRAND/365.25,1)) %>% select(-c(DAYSRAND,AGE.REAL,AGE))



```


```{r}
# building DPPOS dataframe

df_model2 <- dppos_derived %>%
  mutate(
    BMI      = ifelse(!is.na(weight_kg) & !is.na(height_cm) & height_cm > 0,
                      weight_kg / ((height_cm/100)^2), NA_real_),
    BMXWAIST = waist_cm,
    BMXWT = weight_kg,
    BMXHT = height_cm
  ) %>%
  select(
    RELEASE_ID,Phase,VISIT,ASSIGN,
    RIDAGEYR, RIAGENDR, RIDRETH1,
    BMI, BMXWAIST, BPXSY, BPXDI,BMXHT,BMXWT,
    LBDHDD, LBXTC, LBDLDL,    
    LBXGLU, LBXGLT, LBXGH, LBXSCR,
    diabetes_flag, time_to_diabetes
  )

cat("df_model2 built. Rows:", nrow(df_model2), "\n")


## Must match the feature_cols used in the NHANES XGBoost model:
feature_cols <- c(
  "RIDAGEYR","RIAGENDR","RIDRETH1","INDFMPIR","DMDHHSIZ","BMXHT","BMXWT","LBDHDD", "LBXTC", "LBDLDL",
  "BMI","BMXWAIST","BPXSY","BPXDI","LBXSCR","LBXGH","LBXGLU","VISIT","Phase","ASSIGN"
)

## Add missing NHANES predictors as NA (DPPOS doesn’t have income / HH size)
df_dppos_full <- df_model2 %>%
  mutate(
    INDFMPIR = NA_real_,
    DMDHHSIZ = NA_real_
  )

keep_vars <- intersect(
  names(df_dppos_full),
  c(
    "RELEASE_ID",
    "time_to_diabetes",
    "diabetes_flag",
    "LBXGLT",     # keep OGTT explicitly for analysis
    feature_cols
  )
)

df_dppos_model <- df_dppos_full[, keep_vars, drop = FALSE]  %>% relocate(RELEASE_ID,Phase,ASSIGN) %>% arrange(RELEASE_ID,Phase,ASSIGN,VISIT) 

dropped_vars <- setdiff(names(df_dppos_full), names(df_dppos_model))
cat("Dropped", length(dropped_vars), "DPPOS variables:\n")
print(dropped_vars)
```

```{r}
df_dppos_model_full <- df_dppos_model  
df_dppos_model_noNAs.noItv <- df_dppos_model %>% filter(is.finite(LBXGLU),is.finite(LBXGLT),is.finite(LBXGH),!is.na(ASSIGN)) %>% filter(ASSIGN=="Lifestyle" | ASSIGN=="Placebo")
df_dppos_model_noNAs.Itv <- df_dppos_model %>% filter(is.finite(LBXGLU),is.finite(LBXGLT),is.finite(LBXGH),!is.na(ASSIGN)) %>% filter(ASSIGN=="Metformin" | ASSIGN=="Troglitazone")

```


```{r}

saveRDS(df_dppos_model_full,file =           paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/New/df_dppos_model_full.rds"))
readr::write_csv(df_dppos_model_full,file =  paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/New/df_dppos_model_full.csv"))

saveRDS(df_dppos_model_noNAs.noItv,file =           paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/New/df_dppos_model_fullnoNAs.noItv.rds"))
readr::write_csv(df_dppos_model_noNAs.noItv,file =  paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/New/df_dppos_model_fullnoNAs.noItv.csv"))

saveRDS(df_dppos_model_noNAs.Itv,file =           paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/New/df_dppos_model_fullnoNAs.Itv.rds"))
readr::write_csv(df_dppos_model_noNAs.Itv,file =  paste0(path,"DPPOS_V6/New/df_dppos_model_fullnoNAs.Itv.csv"))



cat("df_dppos_model built. Rows:", nrow(df_dppos_model), "\n")

```
